name: simdeck-vscode
description: Open the local SimDeck simulator inside VS Code.

simdeck.serverUrl.description: Preferred URL loaded inside the simulator webview. If this URL is not reachable, the extension tries the default always-on service URL before auto-starting a project service.

simdeck.cliPath.description: Optional path to the simdeck CLI. When empty, the extension first checks the workspace build and then falls back to PATH.

simdeck.port.description: Preferred port used when the extension auto-starts the project service.

simdeck.bindAddress.description: Bind address used when the extension auto-starts the project service.

simdeck.autoStartService.description: Start or reuse a service with `simdeck service start` when opening the simulator view if neither the preferred URL nor the default service URL is already reachable.
